title: preparedview.remove
description: Create a reviewable filesystem plan that removes a generated project source view. Only paths recorded as part of the view are included; inventory data is never targeted. Destructive destination is always 'archive' (R-026-Dest-Archive). The response plan_id enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline (approve → apply). All spec 017/025 error codes can surface during apply. Allowed only when the owning project lifecycle is setup_incomplete|ready|prepared|processing|blocked|completed; refused on archived with lifecycle.read_only (R-026-Lifecycle). Envelope sweep deferred (E-026-1). Status: NOT IMPLEMENTED.

view_id.description: Identifier of the PreparedSourceView to remove.

plan_id.description: Identifier of the produced ViewRemovalPlan (a FilesystemPlan with origin prepared_view_removal). The plan enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline: approve then apply. Destructive destination is hard-coded to archive.

view.not_found.description: No PreparedSourceView exists for the supplied view_id.

view.in_use.description: The view is currently referenced by an active workflow, an in-progress plan, or another concurrent operation and cannot be removed.

view.mixed_kind.description: The view's kind does not match all item materializations. Resolve the kind_diverged state via the UI before removing (D-026-H2, A2, GRILL 2026-05-22).

view.unsupported_kind.description: The view uses a kind not supported in v1 (e.g. hardlink, which is deferred to v1.x — R-026-Strategies, GRILL 2026-05-22).

lifecycle.read_only.description: The owning project is archived. View operations are not permitted on archived projects. Use the spec 009 unarchive transition (archived → ready) first (R-026-Lifecycle, GRILL 2026-05-22). The details object includes allowed_lifecycle_states listing the states that permit this operation.

allowed_lifecycle_states.description: Lifecycle states in which this operation is permitted.
